Class TableRepresentation

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class TableRepresentation extends Object implements Serializable
Represents the state of the poker table from the client's perspective. Includes information about players, community cards, pot size, dealer, and chat messages. Used for rendering the game state in the client UI.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • TableRepresentation

      public TableRepresentation()
      Constructs a new empty TableRepresentation with default values.

  • Method Details

    • addPlayer

      public void addPlayer(String name, int avatarIndex, int startingChips, int bet, boolean folded, boolean isAllIn, ArrayList<Card> myHand)
      Adds a player to the table representation.
      Parameters:
      name - the player's name
      avatarIndex - the player's avatar index
      startingChips - the player's chip count
      bet - the player's current bet
      folded - whether the player has folded
      isAllIn - whether the player is all-in
      myHand - the player's hand (if visible to client)

    • setPotSize

      public void setPotSize(int potSize)
      Sets the current total size of the pot.
      Parameters:
      potSize - the total pot size

    • setBetThreshold

      public void setBetThreshold(int betThreshold)
      Sets the current betting threshold.
      Parameters:
      betThreshold - the minimum bet that must be called

    • setDealerIndex

      public void setDealerIndex(int dealerIndex)
      Sets the index of the dealer in the players list.
      Parameters:
      dealerIndex - index of the dealer

    • setMyHand

      public void setMyHand(ArrayList<Card> myHand)
      Sets the cards in the player's own hand.
      Parameters:
      myHand - the player's hand (must be size 2)

    • setCommunityCards

      public void setCommunityCards(ArrayList<Card> communityCards)
      Sets the shared community cards on the table.
      Parameters:
      communityCards - list of community cards

    • setWaitingForIndex

      public void setWaitingForIndex(int waitingForIndex)
      Sets the index of the player whose turn it is to act.
      Parameters:
      waitingForIndex - index of the player to act

    • getPlayers

      public ArrayList<PlayerRepresentation> getPlayers()
      Gets the list of all player representations.
      Returns:
      list of players

    • getCommunityCards

      Gets the community cards on the table.
      Returns:

      Gets the index of the player whose turn it is.
      Returns:
      index of the current player to act

    • getDealerIndex

      public int getDealerIndex()
      Gets the index of the dealer.
      Returns:
      dealer index

    • getMyHand

      public ArrayList<Card> getMyHand()
      Gets the player's own hand.
      Returns:
      the hand of the current client

    • getPotSize

      public String getPotSize()
      Returns the pot size as a string.
      Returns:
      string representation of the pot size

    • getBetThreshold

      public int getBetThreshold()
      Returns the current bet threshold.
      Returns:
      minimum amount that must be called

    • setYourIndex

      public void setYourIndex(int playersIndex)
      Sets the index of the player representing the client.
      Parameters:
      playersIndex - the index of the local player

    • getYourIndex

      public int getYourIndex()
      Gets the index of the player representing the client.
      Returns:
      local player's index

    • getChatMessages

      public ArrayList<ChatMessage> getChatMessages()
      Gets the list of recent chat messages.
      Returns:
      list of chat messages

    • setChatMessages

      public void setChatMessages(ArrayList<ChatMessage> chatMessages)
      Sets the list of chat messages displayed on the table.
      Parameters:
      chatMessages - new list of chat messages
